creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 203053
update py-twisted to 18.9.0

I've changed the patch to update to 18.9.0. I've also added a missing dependency for the testsuite, however the testsuite still won't pass for me. py-matrix-synapse runs fine with this version of twisted and I would really like to get one of these versions commited. :(

Any input on this package?
